_source: Gkatzelis et al. (2024) ACP 24, 929, Fig. 7c: NOy/SumVOC = y0 + A*MCE^power (ppbv/ppbv). Speciation 70/20/10 NO/NO2/HONO from Roberts et al. (2020) FireLab flaming PMF, per M. Coggon email.

co_from_voc._source: Gkatzelis et al. (2024) ACP 24, 929, Fig. 7b: SumNMOG = intercept + slope*CO (ppbv). 137 ppbv NMOG per ppmv CO = 0.137 ppbv/ppbv. CO = (SumVOC - intercept)/slope.
